title: Pauridia serrata
taxonomy: Pauridia serrata is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is native to South Africa and is commonly known as the 'Purple Star'. The classification of Pauridia serrata includes its kingdom as Plantae, followed by its division as Angiospermophyta. The family classification is Iridaceae and the genus is Pauridia. Within the genus, Pauridia serrata is classified as a species.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
